# Slide index

*Generated by `Teaching_Guide/make_index.py` — do not edit by hand.*

Page numbers are the printed slide numbers in each deck's PDF. Time budgets are proportional to slide count after allowing 35 min per session for arrival, breaks and questions; treat them as a starting point, not a rule.
